target: 6. Reunite and Report the Situation

(At noon on July 23…
The team, which had split into two groups,
reunited and exchanged reports)
(To sum up, the only ones we managed to defeat were Hitobuchi-sensei and her two sons' shadows—transformed into those children themselves—only that)

(The Shimizu family was left with only a stain,
but even after tracking them using Roz and Gil's "nose",
the trail vanished without us finding the shadow)
(Then we also checked the real houses of the shadows we defeated during the gym battle led by Totsumura)
(None had any traces left, but…)

(All the families were telling others they'd gone away for "trips" or "business trips",
so there was no commotion)
But I asked people around…

For example, the Kobayakawa family said Shiori-chan was resting,
so Asako-chan from her brother's wife in Naha went to stay with them.

But when we checked with that couple,
there was no such thing!

In the first round, Totsumura's shadow said 
the Kobayakawa family fled at night due to debt…

Debt!?
I've never heard of any debts!
The shadow is making up arbitrary reasons…

They're taking the initiative to prevent any commotion,
even if we eliminate them.
Probably so they can smoothly hold tomorrow's summer festival.

They don't seem to be attacking from their side…
Maybe they're scared of Ushio's hacking.
They might not even show us their tails anymore…

What they hate the most is canceling the festival…
Can we somehow stop it?

That's right!
Blowing up the venue with firework gunpowder!!
Stop it already, that kind of thing!!!
Terror-like chaos would be bad… Hundreds could panic and cause secondary disasters, and I couldn't predict their next move…
But… I agree with canceling it.
Hm…
For that, we'll have to meet with them.
That's very dangerous.
With full awareness of it.

What are we going to do?
Go in all at once?
No… I'll go alone first and try to persuade them.

Going alone…
Trying to convince them!?

I'm against it.
If Shide sees a real body, 
he'll pull the trigger without thinking!!!
I will kill him.

Wait!! 
Just once… just this one time, let me!
I only want to know what he's thinking.

Otherwise…
It would be impossible for me to kill him…!!!

Why did he kill my parents…?
I want to hear the reason from his mouth!
Otherwise, I can't accept it!!!
You're risking your life for that!?

That's exactly why!! 
Dying once… it's nothing at all!!!

I'll come with you!
Shinpei can sense the shadow's presence.

If the shrine is filled with shadows waiting,
there'll be no chance to talk!
Ushio's right.

If you go alone, 
they might switch to a plan of capturing you.

Shide is also in an artificial loop…
He wouldn't let you commit suicide twice,
for sure.
We'll go as far as the shrine grounds too.
…Understood.
Can we monitor the conversation?
What if you put it in your chest pocket for a group call?

No good, 
we won't be able to hear the conversation.
Then let's use gunshots as a signal!

Ah, I see… so two shots…
No, when the third shot is heard,
that'll be our signal to move in.

Also, if that person's Shide,
wearing the armor will make a shadow presence detectable.

If even slightly, you sense any shadows,
take them down immediately.

(Thinking back…
From the beginning I was trying to meet 'that person')
(The first place where I died…)
(Hitogashima Shrine—this is the beginning of everything)
